summary: Confirmed stable operation after v0.3 release. Awaiting instructions from Alex.

content:
[Request] v0.3 Security Audit
Deadline: Tomorrow 18:00
Items to check: CSP, CORS, API rate limiting
Expected deliverable: Issue creation + PR submission
On it! I'll check all three — CSP, CORS, and API rate limiting. Will create issues and submit PRs.
Security audit started. Found 3 issues: CSP not configured, insufficient CORS restrictions, API rate limiting not implemented. Creating issues and starting PR work.

Security audit — 3 issues created:
#7 CSP not configured (CRITICAL)
#8 Insufficient CORS restrictions (HIGH)
#9 API rate limiting not implemented (HIGH)

Starting with #7 CSP.

summary: CSP middleware implementation in progress. Using nonce-based approach.

content: gh pr create --title 'feat: Content Security Policy' --body '...'
CSP (PR #8) is ready! Used nonce-based script-src restrictions and added frame-ancestors 'none' for clickjacking protection. Ready for review!

summary: Recorded API design principles in knowledge
Created knowledge/pixelforge-api-architecture.md (auth, tenant isolation, rate limiting)
CSP PR created. Tomorrow: CORS and rate limiting PRs.
